verses.text: Two silver trumpets are made to call the assembly. Trumpets. God gives signals for His people.
Two silver trumpets are made to call the assembly. Trumpets. God gives signals for His people.
Two silver trumpets are made to call the assembly. Trumpets. God gives signals for His people.
Two silver trumpets are made to call the assembly. Trumpets. God gives signals for His people.
An alarm sounds for the journey; a steady blast gathers them. Signals. Each blast has its meaning.
An alarm sounds for the journey; a steady blast gathers them. Signals. Each blast has its meaning.
An alarm sounds for the journey; a steady blast gathers them. Signals. Each blast has its meaning.
The priests blow them in war and at feasts, for a memorial. Remembered. The trumpet brings them before God.
The priests blow them in war and at feasts, for a memorial. Remembered. The trumpet brings them before God.
The priests blow them in war and at feasts, for a memorial. Remembered. The trumpet brings them before God.
The cloud lifts; they journey from Sinai. Departure. The pilgrimage resumes.
The cloud lifts; they journey from Sinai. Departure. The pilgrimage resumes.
The cloud lifts; they journey from Sinai. Departure. The pilgrimage resumes.
Judah's camp sets out first. Judah. The appointed order is kept.
Judah's camp sets out first. Judah. The appointed order is kept.
Judah's camp sets out first. Judah. The appointed order is kept.
The Levites bear the tabernacle in the midst. The Levites. The holy things travel in order.
The Levites bear the tabernacle in the midst. The Levites. The holy things travel in order.
The Levites bear the tabernacle in the midst. The Levites. The holy things travel in order.
The Levites bear the tabernacle in the midst. The Levites. The holy things travel in order.
The Levites bear the tabernacle in the midst. The Levites. The holy things travel in order.
Ephraim's camp follows. Ephraim. Each in his place.
Ephraim's camp follows. Ephraim. Each in his place.
Ephraim's camp follows. Ephraim. Each in his place.
Dan's camp comes last, the rereward of all. Dan. The march is complete.
Dan's camp comes last, the rereward of all. Dan. The march is complete.
Dan's camp comes last, the rereward of all. Dan. The march is complete.
Dan's camp comes last, the rereward of all. Dan. The march is complete.
Moses asks Hobab to come and be their eyes for the way. The guide. He seeks help for the journey.
Moses asks Hobab to come and be their eyes for the way. The guide. He seeks help for the journey.

Moses asks Hobab to come and be their eyes for the way. The guide. He seeks help for the journey.
The ark goes before them; Moses cries, 'Rise up, LORD.' The ark leads. God Himself goes before His people.
The ark goes before them; Moses cries, 'Rise up, LORD.' The ark leads. God Himself goes before His people.
